ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Full name of the court */,
  "nick_name" TEXT /* Nickname for the court */,
  "court_type" TEXT /* Type of the court (e.g., tennis, basketball) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players the court can accommodate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the court (e.g., available, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member who made the booking */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court booked */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date and time the booking was made */,
  "made_for_day" TEXT /* Date for which the booking was made */,
  "from_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "number_of_players" INTEGER /* Number of players in the booking */,
  "discount_applied" INTEGER /* Whether a discount was applied to the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled) */,
  "paid" INTEGER /* Whether the booking has been paid for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "nick_name" TEXT /* Nickname for the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "membership_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the membership type */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined */,
  "last_booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the member's last booking */,
  "total_bookings" INTEGER /* Total number of bookings made by the member */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the membership is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_membership_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("membership_type_id") REFERENCES membership_types ("membership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_types" (
  "membership_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership type */,
  "membership_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the membership type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the membership type */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fees associated with the membership type */,
  "discount_rate" TEXT /* Discount rate applicable to the membership type */,
  "validity_period" INTEGER /* Validity period of the membership in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for payment verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* ID of the court associated with the schedule */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the schedule applies to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the schedule */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the schedule */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Whether the schedule is recurring */,
  "recurring_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the recurring schedule (e.g., every week, every month) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings_schedule" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule associated with the booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id", "schedule_id")
)
